use_cases: Smart form inputs that remember and prioritize frequently selected options
Reducing user friction by surfacing previously chosen selections first
Tracking user preferences across sessions via localStorage persistence
Enhancing dropdown UX with frequency and recency-based sorting
Creating personalized selection experiences in web applications
ai_summary: A smart select dropdown component that tracks user selection history in localStorage, automatically prioritizing frequently and recently selected options. Built on top of a base Select component, it supports customizable history limits, persistent storage, and sorting by selection frequency and recency. Designed to reduce friction in repeated form interactions by learning from user behavior.
